classes.name: AlertDispatcher
classes.docstring: Fan-out alert delivery to console + file + optional webhook.

methods.signature: def __init__(self, log_dir: Path, webhook_url: str = "") -> None

classes.name: AlertHandler
classes.docstring: A logging.Handler that forwards WARNING+ records to AlertDispatcher.

methods.name: __init__
methods.signature: def __init__(self, dispatcher: AlertDispatcher, level: int = logging.WARNING) -> None

classes.name: _ProbeWorker
classes.docstring: One-shot thread: attempt TCP to 8.8.8.8:53, emit True/False result.

classes.name: NetWatcher
classes.docstring: Periodically checks internet connectivity and emits ``status_changed``.

methods.name: __init__
methods.signature: def __init__(self, parent: QObject | None = None) -> None

methods.name: start
methods.docstring: Begin monitoring.  First probe fires immediately.

methods.name: stop
methods.docstring: Stop monitoring and wait for any in-flight probe to finish.

methods.name: _probe
methods.docstring: Launch a background probe; skip if a previous one is still running.

classes.name: HealthCheck
classes.docstring: Aggregates broker / DB / universe status into a health report.

classes.name: _DailyDateHandler
classes.docstring: File handler that opens a new ``us_swing_YYYY-MM-DD.log`` each calendar day.

methods.name: __init__
_compute_next_rollover
methods.docstring: Set self.rolloverAt to the next local midnight (seconds since epoch).

top_level_functions.name: configure_logging
top_level_functions.signature: def configure_logging(log_dir: Path, level: str = "INFO", retention_days: int = 30) -> None
top_level_functions.docstring: Set up root logger with a daily dated file handler + stderr stream.

top_level_functions.name: _install_excepthook
top_level_functions.docstring: Replace sys.excepthook to log all uncaught exceptions at CRITICAL.
